title: Contact Management Functions (FR-007 to FR-014)
functionsImplemented: contacts.get(contactId) — Get by ID via GET /contacts/{id}
contacts.bulkImport(contacts[]) — Bulk import via POST /contacts/bulk/import (up to 50K)
contacts.addTag(contactId, tag) — Add tag via POST /contacts/{id}/tags
contacts.removeTag(contactId, tag) — Remove tag via DELETE /contacts/{id}/tags
contacts.listTags() — List all tags via GET /locations/tags
contacts.getCustomFields() — List custom fields via GET /locations/customFields
contacts.updateCustomField(contactId, fieldId, value) — Update custom field via PUT /contacts/{id}
contacts.merge(primaryId, duplicateIds[]) — Merge duplicates via POST /contacts/{id}/merge
notes: All 14 contact management functions implemented with full tRPC procedures. Service takes (GHLService, locationId) constructor and returns GHLApiResponse<T> from all methods. Router registered at ghlContacts namespace in appRouter. Build passes.
